app.title: Horizon ZeldCraft
app.subtitle: Follow Synk on his heroic quest
connect.title: Welcome, Tamer
connect.description: Connect your wallet to meet Synk.
game.mint.title: Begin Synk's adventure
game.mint.name: Your hero's name
game.stats.title: Statistics
game.feed.title: Feed Synk
game.scoreboard.title: 🏆 Scoreboard
game.quests.locked: 🔒 You need {v} XP to attempt this riddle.
game.npcs.empty: No NPCs around… Come back tomorrow, they move around!
game.teams.joinLabel: Or join an existing team (numeric ID):
chat.empty: No messages yet. Be the first!
chat.emptyNoFirebase: Configure Firebase to enable real-time chat (see docs).
chat.rtLatency: ⚡ Firebase Realtime DB · latency < 500 ms · 🔒 Anonymous auth
chat.fallbackHint: 💡 Add NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* to .env.local to enable real-time chat.
admin.title: Admin panel
admin.revenue.title: 💎 Contract revenue
admin.revenue.hint: 💡 Feeds are sent directly to the treasury. The contract balance is only for accidental funds.
admin.item.title: 🛒 Add a catalog item
admin.item.label: Label
admin.quest.title: 🗡️ Add a riddle quest
admin.quest.label: Question / prompt
admin.quest.saved: Quest saved to the database (no gas required).
admin.quest.hint: 💡 The answer is hashed client-side (keccak256); the quest (catalog + hash + rewards) is stored exclusively in the database — no blockchain transaction needed.
admin.npc.title: 🧙 Add an NPC
admin.npc.name: Name
admin.treasure.title: 💎 Add a treasure
admin.treasure.name: Name
admin.world.title: 🗺️ Add a world
admin.world.name: Name
admin.difficulty.title: ⚔️ Global game difficulty
admin.difficulty.hint: Quests with higher minDifficulty will be blocked.
admin.weather.title: 🌤️ Weather conditions
admin.weather.hint: By default, weather auto-rotates 3 times per day (every 8h) via an on-chain pseudo-random seed.
admin.npcFreq.title: 🧙 NPC encounter frequency
admin.npcFreq.hint: Max NPCs a player can meet per day (1 to 10). Selection is random but deterministic.
admin.cooldowns.title: ⏱️ Feeding cooldowns (seconds)
admin.cooldowns.hint: Set 0 to disable a cooldown (testing). Prod defaults: Daily=72000, Weekly=518400, Monthly=2419200, Yearly=30240000.
admin.price.title: 💰 Change feeding price
admin.stats.title: 📊 Per-player statistics
admin.stats.description: Paste a player address to see their progression (score, solved quests, NPCs met, treasures, worlds).
admin.stats.noVoxlyn: This wallet does not own a Synk.
admin.stats.name: Synk name
admin.chatHistory.title: 💬 Chat history
admin.chatHistory.description: Browse messages sent by a player across all teams.
game.inventory.confirmUseMsg: Use {name}? The item will be consumed.
sleep.hint: No actions during sleep. Buy super-potions to avoid this next time.
sleep.title: Synk is exhausted...
sleep.description: HP dropped below 20/100. Forced rest restores 75 HP.
admin.repRules.description: Adjust how many reputation points are gained or lost during random NPC encounters. Negative values allowed. Stored in Firebase (catalog/repRules), read on every popup.
admin.repRules.title: Reputation rules (encounters)
admin.stats.noTxsHint: On-chain history is loaded via Etherscan V2 API (requires NEXT_PUBLIC_ETHERSCAN_KEY in Vercel env vars).
admin.stats.noTxs: No transactions found for this player on this contract.
admin.stats.etherscanKeyMissing: NEXT_PUBLIC_ETHERSCAN_KEY missing — only transactions logged since v2.2 are visible. Add the key in Vercel to see full history.
admin.stats.viewWalletEtherscan: See all this wallet's transactions on Etherscan
admin.chatHistory.errorPerm: Firebase permission denied on /chats. Add rule chats/.read: true OR verify chatIndex is populated.
encounters.title: Encounters
encounters.description: Log of NPCs met during your explorations
encounters.pick: Select an encounter to see the details
encounters.noneToday: No encounter yet today — wait, an NPC will appear soon!
scoreboard.title: World players ranking
scoreboard.description: Ranked by total XP (on-chain + off-chain bonus). Live updates.
game.wallet.title: Wallet
admin.repRules.fightLootPct: Combat — % of loser's purse taken by the winner
admin.repRules.fightLootMaxWallet: Combat — max loot cap in game currency
admin.repRules.fightLootMaxItems: Combat — items that can change hands (0 = disabled)
admin.repRules.fightLootChancePct: Combat — % chance to win/lose an item
admin.repRules.fightForceWeight: D20 roll — Force weight in the player bonus
admin.repRules.fightHpWeight: D20 roll — HP weight in the player bonus
admin.repRules.fightHungerWeight: D20 roll — Hunger weight in the player bonus
admin.repRules.fightSpellsWeight: D20 roll — Spells weight in the player bonus
admin.repRules.fightNpcBonusMax: D20 roll — max NPC bonus (derived from its Force)
admin.repRules.fightNpcForceRef: D20 roll — NPC reference Force to reach max bonus
admin.repRules.dailyLuckWalletReward: 🌟 Daily luck roll — game currency reward (success)
game.wallet.topUpHint: Buy game currency by paying in ETH. Pre-configured presets.
admin.topup.description: Configure the amounts available in the Top-up popup (fiat → ETH → game coins)
admin.topup.title: Wallet top-up presets
game.inventory.title: Bag
game.inventory.empty: Your bag is empty. Buy, hunt or wait for an encounter!
game.inventory.hint: Items are stored off-chain (Firebase) — no gas required.
game.shop.title: Shop
game.shop.hint: Micro-purchases use the game currency to avoid gas. Contract redeployment loses nothing: everything is saved.
npc.dialogue.trade: {name} unrolls their merchant cloak and offers you a trade.
npc.dialogue.quest: {name} whispers: "I have a dangerous mission for an adventurer of your caliber…"
npc.dialogue.fight: {name} draws their weapon and challenges you to a duel!
npc.dialogue.chat: {name} greets you and wants to talk about the world.
npc.chat.hint.label: Hint
npc.chat.fallback.continue: I have nothing more to add for now.
npc.chat.script.greeting.npc: A fine day to go exploring, don't you think?
npc.chat.script.greeting.yes: Glad to see an optimistic adventurer!
npc.chat.script.greeting.no: Ah... times are tough, I'll grant you that.
npc.chat.script.greeting.dontknow: What matters is to keep moving forward!
npc.chat.script.greeting.continue: Then let me tell you a legend...
npc.chat.script.greeting.hints: Look at your unsolved riddles, a hint may be waiting for you there...
npc.chat.script.legend.npc: They say an ancient guardian protects a secret at the heart of the Temporal Nexus...
npc.chat.script.legend.yes: I knew it! Be careful, adventurer.
npc.chat.script.legend.no: No matter, some secrets remain sealed.
npc.chat.script.legend.dontknow: Many don't know it, which makes the story fascinating.
npc.chat.script.legend.continue: I don't know any more, but good luck to you!
npc.chat.script.legend.hints: A hint? Look at your unsolved riddles...
chat.needName: ⚠ Choose a nickname to start chatting
game.familiars.description: Chimeric companions met throughout your epic.
game.familiars.needXp: You need {v} XP to meet this familiar.
game.familiars.needItem: You must own "{name}" in your bag.
game.familiars.confirmTameItemNote: The required item will be consumed.
admin.familiars.title: 🐲 Add a familiar
admin.familiars.label: Familiar name
admin.familiars.saved: Familiar saved to database (no gas required).
admin.familiars.hint: 💡 The familiar is stored exclusively in the database. Required XP and an optional rare item (to own in the bag) gate the taming.
admin.chatScripts.title: 💬 NPC dialogue scripts
admin.chatScripts.description: Each script = one opening line + 5 fixed reactions (Yes/No/I don't know/Continue/Give more hints). Chain a script to another via its ID ("Next script") to build multi-turn conversations.
admin.chatScripts.revealHint: Reveals the hint for the next unsolved riddle
admin.chatScripts.saved: Script saved to the database (no gas required).
admin.chatScripts.hint: 💡 100% off-chain. Leave a "Reply" empty to disable a button (a generic fallback reaction will be used instead).
quest.riddle_first: 🪨 Riddle 1: I am hard as stone but I float on water. What am I?
quest.riddle_zelda: 🗡️ Riddle 2 (Zelda): Which legendary weapon seals evil in Hyrule?
quest.riddle_mc: ⛏️ Riddle 3 (Minecraft): Which block must I mine to craft a diamond pickaxe?
quest.riddle_wow: ⚔️ Riddle 4 (WoW): What is the name of the legendary sword forged from Thunderaan's shards?
quest.riddle_dragon: 🐉 Riddle 5 (Draconic Legend): According to legend, what shimmering material are ancient dragon scales made of?
quest.riddle_first.hint: Under strong heat, I slowly disappear by turning liquid.
quest.riddle_zelda.hint: It sleeps on a pedestal, surrounded by a sacred forest, awaiting the hero of time.
quest.riddle_mc.hint: Found deep underground, sparkling, far rarer than iron or gold.
quest.riddle_wow.hint: Forged from the shards of an elemental lord of lightning defeated at Blackrock.
quest.riddle_dragon.hint: A transparent, hard material that catches light like precious glass.
dice.title: Dice roll
dice.hint: 💡 Persistent dice widget — drag it wherever you like. Foundation for a future random-events system.
